prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: Matchatro enemy_animation_set chroma-key source sheet for sprite pipeline
Primary request: Create a complete 8-frame armored undead enemy animation source sheet on one 1536x1024 canvas, arranged in exact 4 columns by 2 rows. This is a source sheet for deterministic chroma-key extraction and sprite normalization.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid chroma-key background color #00FFFF covering every background pixel. No checkerboard, no transparency, no gradient, no texture, no scenery, no shadows on the background.
Subject: same skeleton warlord enemy in every frame, front-facing three-quarter view, dark iron horned helmet, skull face with orange eyes, blackened armor, red torn cloth, one axe and round shield. Eight readable animation poses: idle, ready, windup, slash, impact follow-through, recoil, recover, idle return. Keep the same character, same outfit, same silhouette family, same scale, same facing direction across all frames.
Style/medium: polished hand-painted 2D fantasy game sprite sheet, crisp contours, clean cel-painted highlights, production asset tone.
Composition/framing: exact 4x2 row-major sheet. Each frame occupies a 384x512 slot with the enemy centered horizontally and feet aligned near the same bottom baseline. Put clear empty cyan background between frames. No frame dividers, no white bars, no cropped axe, no cropped limbs, no overlapping frames. Every full body and weapon fits inside its slot with at least 24 px padding.
Color palette: dark iron, bone ivory, black leather, muted red cloth, warm orange eyes, bronze highlights. Do not use #00FFFF or near-cyan key color inside the enemy body, weapon, shield, antialias edges, glows, or particles.
Lighting/mood: threatening but readable, game-scale clarity.
Constraints: opaque chroma-key source only; exact 4 columns by 2 rows; flat #00FFFF background; no transparency request; no checkerboard; no labels; no text; no watermark; no poster composition; no extra characters; no duplicated detached body parts; no cropped frames.
Avoid: key-color spill, background texture, frame borders, white separator bars, severed limbs, inconsistent armor, huge effects that leave the slot, side-facing poses, close-up portraits.
